narrative:
Jude Bellingham is a standout Attacking Midfield for the United Kingdom. He holds an impressive overall rating of 7.68/10, placing him in the top 1% of attacking midfields at this tournament. His rating range of 7.31–8.05 reflects strong performances across his 404 World Cup minutes played.

Bellingham demonstrates exceptional attacking prowess, scoring 0.891 goals per 90 minutes at this World Cup, significantly higher than his 0.289 club goals per 90. He is also actively involved defensively, making 2.673 tackles per 90 minutes. His 2.45 shots per 90 and 1.782 key passes per 90 highlight his consistent threat in creating chances.

Bellingham is a pivotal figure for his national team, driving both offensive production and defensive effort from midfield. Scouts and fans should continue to watch his remarkable goal-scoring form and high tackle rate in upcoming matches. His consistent impact across both phases of play will be crucial for the United Kingdom's success.
